name: Typo!
short_description: Defend your computer's firewall in this fast-paced typing game, battling waves of word-based viruses in Endless or Survival mode, where speed and accuracy are your only weapons against defeat.
detailed_description:
Welcome to "Typo!" a thrilling typing game that tests your skills as you fend off waves of viruses attacking your computer's firewall! With two exciting modes, Endless and Survival, you'll type your way to victory as you face down increasingly challenging word-based viruses that need to be destroyed before they breach your defenses.

In Endless Mode, aim for the highest score as you tackle endless waves of viruses. But be careful—make more than 10 typos, and it’s game over! In Survival Mode, you'll need to be quick and precise; every virus that slips through damages your firewall, and once your firewall is depleted, it’s game over. Type accurately, stay focused, and defend your firewall at all costs!

Key Features:

  • Two Game Modes: Test your endurance in Endless Mode or face the ultimate challenge in Survival Mode.

  • Progressive Difficulty: Viruses increase in speed and complexity as you advance.

  • Typing Practice: Improve your typing skills while defending your virtual firewall.

  • Real-Time Action: Intense, fast-paced gameplay keeps you on your toes.

  • High Score Tracking: Compete with yourself and others to see who can defend the firewall the longest.

Can you keep the viruses at bay and defend your firewall?

Upcoming Features

  • More than 300 new Achievements

  • Community assets for your Profile

  • Linux version
